summary: Regression smoke after package.json change (ajv ^8 added as direct dep, overrides block removed). Frontend bundle loads cleanly with no JS errors; backend healthy; both admin and employee auth flows render their respective dashboards correctly.
passed: package.json: ajv ^8 in dependencies, no overrides field (resolutions block retained)
/login page renders with email+password inputs and Sign in button, no bundle/JS errors

Admin login (admin@taskflow.com/admin123) -> redirects to /admin; Team Overview KPIs (Employees 5, Total Tasks 9, Completed 4, Hours 11.0), Workload chart, Status donut and employee table all rendered
Employee login (maya@taskflow.com/employee123) -> redirects to /tasks; Kanban (To Do/In Progress/Done) populated with task cards, KPIs visible
No pageerror or console errors captured during full flow
